name: Iris Petal
description: A soft petal from the meadow irises of Datasedge. Scholars swear each one's measurements tell you exactly which of three families it belongs to.

name: Meadow Honey
description: Golden honey from Datasedge hives. The bees visit every iris in perfect rotation, which the beekeeper insists is 'a sampling strategy.'

name: Data Shard
description: A glittering fragment left behind when a monster dissolves. Warm to the touch, faintly humming with whatever it used to know.

name: Traveler's Tonic
description: Bootstrap's classic remedy: iris petals steeped in meadow honey. Tastes like a warm afternoon. Restores two hearts.
